title: Honor long Retry-After cooldown hints
goal: Separate provider cooldown pacing from same-request retry sleep so long server Retry-After hints protect subsequent requests without changing the short retry backoff cap.
completionConditions: Shared provider cooldown recording uses full Retry-After hints beyond the short retry backoff cap.
Same-request retry delay behavior remains capped by DEFAULT_RETRY_BACKOFF_CAP_MS.
Excessively large Retry-After hints are bounded by a separate provider cooldown cap.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Follow-up to issue #27 after final retry cooldown recording. Keep scope in shared routing helper and provider governor tests.
